title: Only Excavator
description: Only Excavator mod is a mod which adds Excavator which mine 3x3
body:
Only Excavator mod is a mod which adds crafteable useful Excavator which are shovels that mine 3x3, from iron excavator till netherite excavator in a vanilla experience, which makes easier to flatten a plain zone or delete a chunk, anything that you come up with. And you only need 3 ores from each material and two sticks to crafte it

This Mod is very useful joined with Only Hammer Mod

Versions:
3.0.0 Version adds a creative tab, spannish language and changes a little all excavators textures

2.5.0 Changes some Excavators textures, adds two new achievments and change another two

2.0.0 Adds two new excavators, Stone and Wooden ones, and fix some errors with iron and gold excavators

1.5.0 Adds achievments to the mod
